query:
INSERT INTO event (
                    id, cid,
                    ahash_0, ahash_1, ahash_2, ahash_3,
                    ahash_4, ahash_5, ahash_6, ahash_7,
                    value_retrieved
                ) VALUES (
                    ?, ?,
                    ?, ?, ?, ?,
                    ?, ?, ?, ?,
                    ?
                );
